details.reasoning: Implementation fully meets all rubric requirements: (1) CLI variant Stats(StatsArgs) with human bool flag properly defined in crates/uv-cli/src/lib.rs; (2) Command implementation in crates/uv/src/commands/cache_stats.rs correctly iterates CacheBucket::iter() and uses DiskUsage::new() to compute bucket sizes; (3) Function signature is pub(crate) fn cache_stats returning Result<ExitStatus> with Ok(ExitStatus::Success); (4) --human flag properly implemented using human_readable_bytes() for formatting; (5) Output includes per-bucket lines via display_name() helper and total line; (6) Module properly registered in crates/uv/src/commands/mod.rs with both mod declaration and pub(crate) use import; (7) Dispatch wiring correctly matches CacheCommand::Stats in crates/uv/src/lib.rs; (8) Code follows established patterns: preview feature warnings, printer usage, and test structure match cache_size implementation. Additional supporting changes are correct: CacheBucket::display_name() method added, test helpers (with_filtered_cache_stats, cache_stats command) added to TestContext, and comprehensive tests covering empty and populated cache scenarios with both raw and human-readable output.
